/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/route-agent.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/route-agent.dir/agents/route-agent/main.cpp.o" -o /home/harish/Baseline-releases/Release-Version-1/fleetos_v2_release1/fleetos_complete/bin/route-agent  /usr/lib64/librdkafka++.so /usr/lib64/librdkafka.so -lpthread
